allow: Bash(node -e "const {readFileSync} = require\('fs'\); const c = readFileSync\('.env.local', 'utf8'\); console.log\(c.split\(/\\r?\\n/\).find\(l => l.startsWith\('ANTHROPIC'\)\)\);")
Bash(node -e "process.env.FOO=''; console.log\('FOO in env:', 'FOO' in process.env, 'val:', JSON.stringify\(process.env.FOO\)\);")
